# Tasks

The audit-workflow task queue and per-task working files. `queue.md` is the canonical list of pending, in-progress, and completed audit tasks. Larger tasks may have their own working file (`task-<id>-<slug>.md`) alongside the queue entry.

**Note on overlap with `docs/product/task-queue.md`:** a pre-existing product task queue lives under `docs/product/`. `docs/tasks/` is reserved for tasks generated by the audit and execution workflow (Phases 1–5); the product queue continues to track the broader product backlog. A future consolidation may merge them.

Created as part of the Phase 0 audit-workflow scaffolding. Files here will be populated from **Phase 4 (topic brainstorming → tasks → PRs → merges)** onward, with task-level execution by Claude in each session.
